query: INSERT INTO services (userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (1, 'ZAP - Zero-to-Ads Platform', 'coaching', 'ZAP is an AI-powered marketing automation platform that generates complete marketing campaigns in minutes. Create Meta-compliant Facebook ads, email sequences, WhatsApp campaigns, landing pages, and offers instantly. Built by Arfeen Khan (featured in Forbes), ZAP combines proven marketing frameworks with AI to help coaches, speakers, and consultants launch campaigns 10x faster.', 'Coaches, speakers, consultants, and marketing agency owners aged 30-55 who are drowning in manual marketing tasks. They spend weeks creating campaigns manually, struggle with Meta ad policy violations, and cant scale their client work. Theyre tech-savvy enough to use AI tools but frustrated by the complexity of marketing automation platforms.', 'Launch complete marketing campaigns in hours instead of weeks. ZAPs AI generates 110+ marketing assets (ads, emails, landing pages, offers) that are Meta-compliant and conversion-optimized. Save 40+ hours per week on campaign creation, scale your business without hiring, and get campaigns live 10x faster with proven frameworks built-in.', 997, NOW(), NOW());
